_comment: Canonical wire envelope for all pub/sub messages crossing component boundaries. g8ee publishes VSOMessage (g8ee component), VSA publishes ResultMessage (vsa component). Both follow this shape. Consumers: g8ee (Python), VSA (Go), VSOD (JS).

envelope._description: Outer envelope wrapping every pub/sub message on any channel.

source_component.description: Component that published this message. See status.json component.name.

event_type.description: Event type string. Must be a value from events.json.

operator_id.description: Operator identifier. Required for all VSA-originated messages.

operator_session_id.description: Operator session identifier. Required for all VSA-originated messages.

web_session_id.description: Browser session identifier. Required when message is targeted to a specific frontend tab.

instance_id.description: Source component instance identifier. g8ee-only, optional.

system_fingerprint.description: SHA256 fingerprint of the operator host system. VSA-only, included in VSA-originated messages.

payload.description: Event-specific payload. Shape is defined by event_type. See result_payloads.json and command_payloads.json.

metadata.description: Auxiliary routing metadata (e.g. reply_to_topic). Not used by VSA.

_comment.vsa: VSA's ResultMessage uses `payload` as a raw JSON blob (json.RawMessage). Fields `instance_id` and `metadata` are absent in VSA-originated messages. Fields `system_fingerprint` and `source_component` are always present in VSA messages.
_comment.g8ee: g8ee's VSOMessage uses `payload` as a typed dict. Fields `system_fingerprint` is absent in g8ee-originated messages.
_comment.channels: Messages are published to channels defined in channels.json. The envelope is the same regardless of channel.
